title: SessionDetail
description: Full session payload returned by scanSession(). Extends SessionListItem with the messages array, file-history snapshots, and launch info. Note: this schema deliberately allows additionalProperties to accommodate fields defined in SessionListItem; for strict validation in cross-language consumers, validate SessionListItem fields separately.

messages.description: Flattened messages. Subagent tool_use and tool_result messages are inlined when includeSubagentMessages is true (the default).

fileHistorySnapshots.description: File-history snapshots recorded during the session, in file order.

launchInfo.description: Launch-time metadata (model, permission mode, cwd, repository).
